## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX and Vertical Scope, facilitated by Janice Liu of Mantis Group.](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vertical Scope is a public company with 1,200+ sites and 140M+ users, primarily forum-based](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [GrowthX's current offerings (editorial/SEO content) may not perfectly align with Vertical Scope's forum-centric needs](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Potential exists for custom solutions, but GrowthX is cautious about overcommitting to engineering-heavy projects](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Janice may introduce GrowthX to other content media customers better suited for their services](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

## Topics

### Vertical Scope Overview

  - [Public company with 1,200+ sites across English-speaking regions](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [140M+ users in ecosystem, primarily forum-based (Reddit-like structure)](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [200 employees globally, with market-specific teams](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Clean, structured and unstructured data, mature content owner team](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Diverse categories from agriculture to urban planning and tech](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)

### GrowthX's Current Offerings and Challenges

  - [Specializes in editorial and programmatic SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Base package: 12 months at $9K/month, can be expensive for early-stage companies](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Cautious about taking on highly custom, engineering-centric projects](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Open to adapting workflows for forum-based content, but no existing use case](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Longer-form content opportunities on specific Vertical Scope sites (e.g., RateMD)](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Possibility of adapting SEO workflows to forum medium](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [Vertical Scope interested in reviving old posts and increasing user engagement](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)

### Mantis Group's Role

  - [Helping Vertical Scope create data products (lead gen, research products)](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Using NLP for sentiment analysis from forums](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Recommending ways to create more engaging opportunities for users](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Network Connections

  - [Janice connected with GrowthX through Candy, who hired Kyle at Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Kyle and Janice share connections with Vivian, a former Homebase employee](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to research more about Vertical Scope's surface areas beyond forums](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Janice to potentially introduce GrowthX to other content media customers](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Kyle to meet with Chris (Vertical Scope) tomorrow for follow-up discussion](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Kyle to clarify GrowthX's capabilities and limitations in tomorrow's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/sAxpsJrszgwiPwoVQcYC98vBaAe1jGoz?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
